core_philosophy: Pure Apple / iOS feel. Clean, restrained, premium. 'Would Apple ship this?' test. Max-width 430px centered column on desktop. Sentence case everywhere.

typography.font_family: -apple-system, 'SF Pro Display', 'SF Pro Text', Inter, sans-serif
typography.rules: Sentence case everywhere — never ALL CAPS. Use explicit font sizes and weights provided below.

elevation.rules: No heavy shadows — keep flat and light

icons.style: SF Symbols style. Outlined style, 20px default. Filled only for active/selected states.

tone_and_copy.style: Warm, personal, like the app was made by a friend for friends.

components.bottom_navigation_bar: 4 tabs (Explore/Friends/Trips/Profile), icons + labels. Active color: #0A84FF. Inactive color: #8E8E93.
components.fab: Circular, #0A84FF background, white '+' icon, bottom right, expands to speed dial with 3 options.
components.bottom_sheets: For forms — slide up with spring animation. box-shadow: 0 -2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.12).
components.category_chips: Tonal category chips: each category has its own subtle tinted background matching its accent color (e.g. #FF9F0A for food with 10-15% opacity background). Fully pill-shaped.
components.avatars: Circular avatars with initials fallback on tinted background — never grey silhouettes. Grouped/Stacked avatars: overlapping circles, max 3 visible + '+N' overflow.
components.desktop_wrapper: Center the app in a max-width 430px column on larger screens. The outer body should be #F2F2F7 or a darker gray to contrast the mobile view.

key_screens_layout.splash_login: Dark-themed login (#1C1C1E) + multi-step signup (invite code -> name/email/password -> photo + bio).
key_screens_layout.explore_tab: City grid -> city detail with dark header showing flag emoji + city name, horizontal friends-who've-been strip, pill category filter tabs (All/Food/Experience/Stay/Getting Around), recommendation cards with stacked avatars, Save button with spring animation.
key_screens_layout.add_recommendation: Bottom sheet: place name with Google Places autocomplete, city pre-fill, 4 category chips, optional note + 4:3 photo.
key_screens_layout.friend_profile: Dark hero (#1C1C1E) with circular avatar + name + bio + hero stat counters side by side + Follow pill button. Below: countries -> cities -> recommendations. 'Ask [Name] about [City]' WhatsApp deeplink.
key_screens_layout.my_profile: Same dark header, Trips/Bucket list tabs, invite code shareable card at bottom, edit/delete on own recs.
key_screens_layout.trip_plans: Saved recs grouped by city, checkbox-to-mark-visited (no deletion), trip lifecycle prompt.
key_screens_layout.friends_tab: Search, 'people you follow', 'discover' list with Follow buttons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use the exact hex codes provided in this JSON.
Implement the PWA max-width constraint wrapper (max-width: 430px, margin: 0 auto) on the root layout to maintain the mobile-first iOS app feel on desktop browsers.
Use Lucide React icons exclusively with size={20}, default to outline, use fill variants ONLY for active states.
Implement Framer Motion for bottom sheet spring, tab crossfade, and button press scales.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements for robust testing.
For typography, use arbitrary values in Tailwind or configure the theme to match the exact pixel sizes and weights (e.g., text-[28px] font-bold).
NEVER use placeholder images from dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the URLs provided in the media section.
Ensure the entire app uses sentence case. Avoid uppercase text styling completely.
